signals.headline: Ethereum Reaches $6K Following Pectra Upgrade Testing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Reaches $6K Following Pectra Upgrade Testing | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 18, 2026, Ethereum experienced "massive surge in institutional demand" with the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade entering its final testing phase**.[5] This upgrade promises to revolutionize wallet abstraction and validator efficiency.[5]
